The '''51st''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from February 7 to 18, 2001.<ref name="Berlinale 2000">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2001/01_jahresblatt_2001/01_Jahresblatt_2001.html|title=51st Berlin International Film Festival |access-date=2012-10-21 |work=berlinale.de}}</ref> The festival opened with war-drama film ''[[Enemy at the Gates]]'' by [[Jean-Jacques Annaud]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.screendaily.com/berlin-confirms-enemy-at-the-gates-as-opener/404665.article  |title=Berlin confirms Enemy At The Gates as opener |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=screendaily.com | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140902093539/http://www.screendaily.com/berlin-confirms-enemy-at-the-gates-as-opener/404665.article| archive-date=2 September 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://abcnews.go.com/Entertainment/story?id=109818 |title=Enemy at the Gates Opens Berlin Film Festival |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=abcnews.go.com | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140502002002/https://abcnews.go.com/Entertainment/story?id=109818| archive-date=2 May 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> [[70 mm film|70 mm]] restored version of [[Stanley Kubrick]]'s 1968 Sci-fi film ''[[2001: A Space Odyssey (film)|2001: A Space Odyssey]]'' was the closing film of the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.nitrateonline.com/2001/fberlin01.html  |title=Berlin Gets Intimate |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=nitrateonline.com | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080720134153/http://www.nitrateonline.com/2001/fberlin01.html| archive-date=20 July 2008 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.backstage.com/news/screen-version-of-wit-to-premeire-at-berlin-film-festival/ |title=Screen Version of 'Wit' to Premeire [sic] at Berlin Film Festival |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=backstage.com | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140902092901/http://www.backstage.com/news/screen-version-of-wit-to-premeire-at-berlin-film-festival/| archive-date=2 September 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Intimacy (2001 film)|Intimacy]]'', directed by [[Patrice Chéreau]].<ref name="PRIZES" />

The retrospective section was dedicated to German-Austrian filmmaker [[Fritz Lang]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

==Juries==
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2001/04_jury_2001/04_Jury_2001.html |title=JURIES 2001 |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131015074641/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2001/04_jury_2001/04_Jury_2001.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competitions ===
* [[Bill Mechanic]], American producer - Jury President
* [[Jacqueline Bisset]], British actress
* Diego Galán, Spanish director and film critic
* Kyoko Hirano, Japanese writer
* [[Fatih Akın]], German filmmaker, producer and actor
* [[Dario Argento]], Italian filmmaker and producer
* [[Xie Fei (director)|Xie Fei]], Chinese filmmaker
* [[Héctor Babenco]], Brazilian-Argentine filmmaker and producer
* [[Dominique Blanc (actress)|Dominique Blanc]], French actress

==Official Sections==

=== Panorama ===
The following films were shown:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2001/film/news/berlin-fest-plucks-dicaprio-s-plum-1117792407/
|title=Berlin Fest plucks DiCaprio's 'Plum' |access-date=22 January 2001}}</ref>

==Official Awards==
[[File:ParticeChéreau.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Patrice Chéreau]], winner of the [[Golden Bear]] at the festival]]

=== Main Competition ===
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2001/03_preistr_ger_2001/03_Preistraeger_2001.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2001|access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015074930/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2001/03_preistr_ger_2001/03_Preistraeger_2001.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Intimacy (2001 film)|Intimacy]]'' by [[Patrice Chéreau]]
* [[Jury Grand Prix|Silver Bear Special Jury Prize]]: ''[[Beijing Bicycle]]'' by [[Wang Xiaoshuai]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Lin Cheng-sheng]] for ''[[Betelnut Beauty (film)|Betelnut Beauty]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Kerry Fox]] for ''[[Intimacy (2001 film)|Intimacy]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Benicio del Toro]] for ''[[Traffic (2000 film)|Traffic]]''
* '''Silver Bear for an Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': Raúl Pérez Cubero for ''[[You're the One (2000 film)|You're the One]]''
* [[Silver Bear Jury Prize]]: [[Lone Scherfig]] for ''[[Italian for Beginners]]''
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[La ciénaga (film)|La Ciénaga]]'' by [[Lucrecia Martel]]

=== [[Honorary Golden Bear]] ===
* [[Kirk Douglas]]

=== Berlinale Camera ===
* [[Kei Kumai]]

== Independent Awards ==

=== Blue Angel Award ===
* ''[[Intimacy (2001 film)|Intimacy]]'' by [[Patrice Chéreau]]

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*''[[Italian for Beginners]]'' by [[Lone Scherfig]]
